desc: Co-founder of Anthropic.
CEO of Anthropic.
Former VP of Research at OpenAI.
Editor of the Journal of the American Medical Association (JAMA), published by the AMA.
The FDA investigated Wilhelm Reich and obtained an injunction against his work.
Director of the CIA.
White House Chief of Staff under President Bill Clinton.
Member of Skull and Bones.
Led the Kerry Committee Investigation.
Vice President of J.P. Morgan.
Closely associated with Lucis Trust and its World Goodwill organization.
Frequent speaker and participant at the Esalen Institute.
Challenged the 'Seven Sisters' oil cartel, which included Standard Oil companies.
Served as CEO of OpenAI from 2019, with a brief ousting and reinstatement in 2023.
Served as president of Y Combinator from 2014 to 2019.
Became a partner at Y Combinator in 2011.
Early seed investor in Minicircle alongside Peter Thiel.
Peter Thiel was Altman's mentor and main backer in Silicon Valley, providing most of the capital for Hydrazine Capital.
Described as 'very close friends' and Thiel warned Altman about AI safety conflicts.
Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei refused to negotiate a deal that could have led to a merge of OpenAI and Anthropic.
Served as president of Purdue Pharma from 1999 to 2003.
Served as co-chairman of the board of Purdue Pharma from 2003 to 2019.
Joined Purdue Pharma in 1971 as assistant to his father. Headed research and development (c. 1990-1999) and marketing.
Member of the Sackler family; Arthur Sackler was his uncle and co-owner of Purdue Pharma.
Co-founder of the Bilderberg Group in 1954.
Member of the Nazi Party from April 1933 to January 1937. Also a member of the Sturmabteilung (SA) and Reiter-SS Corps.
Worked as an executive secretary at the Paris office of IG Farben from 1935, and worked for the company in the early-to-mid 1930s.
Implicated in a bribery scandal involving Lockheed Aircraft Corporation in 1976, admitting to accepting bribes.
Served as Director of the Central Intelligence Agency from March 2013 to January 2017.
Served as CIA station chief in Saudi Arabia from 1996 to 1999.
Served as Chief of Staff to CIA Director George Tenet from 1999 to 2001.
Served as Deputy Executive Director of the CIA from March 2001 to March 2003.
Served as the CIA's daily intelligence briefer for President Bill Clinton from 1994 to 1995.
Involved in the 2011 raid that killed Osama bin Laden.
Claimed to have worked at a secret site (S-4 facility) near Area 51 in the late 1980s.
News reporter George Knapp interviewed Bob Lazar and brought his claims about Area 51 to public attention in 1989.
Claimed to have worked at a secret site near the United States Air Force facility popularly known as Area 51.
Testified at the 2001 Disclosure Project event at the National Press Club.
Alice Bailey's work was influenced by the Theosophical teachings of Helena Blavatsky.
Lucis Trust (originally Lucifer Publishing Company) was founded by Alice Bailey, whose work was influenced by Blavatsky's Theosophy.
Son of Admiral George S. Morrison, who commanded the fleet during the Gulf of Tonkin Incident.
Her book 'The History of the Standard Oil Company' (1904) exposed John D. Rockefeller's business practices.
Her book 'The History of the Standard Oil Company' (1904) exposed the practices of Standard Oil.
Accused of providing illegal funding for Nicolas Sarkozy's 2007 presidential campaign.
Initiated the Stratospheric Controlled Perturbation Experiment (SCoPEx) at Harvard University.
Initiated the SCoPEx project with Frank Keutsch at Harvard University.
Co-managed the Fund for Innovative Energy and Climate Research (FICER) with Ken Caldeira.
Co-managed the Fund for Innovative Energy and Climate Research (FICER), established by Bill Gates.
Founder, chairman, and CEO of Meta Platforms (formerly Facebook).
Faced congressional hearings over Cambridge Analytica's improper use of Facebook user data.
Sean Parker served as the first president of Facebook and was influential in its early development.
Criticized Ancel Keys' fat hypothesis, arguing sugar was a primary cause of heart disease.
Her research on sugar industry documents supported and brought renewed attention to John Yudkin's work.
Served as Secretary of State under President Dwight D. Eisenhower.
Brother of CIA Director Allen Dulles.
Had access to the Central Intelligence Agency through his brother, Allen Dulles, who was then CIA director.
Served as Director of the National Security Agency.
Served as Director of the Central Intelligence Agency.

Initiated and oversaw the NSA surveillance of digital communications between persons in the United States and foreign citizens who allegedly had ties to terrorist groups, which resulted in the NSA warrantless surveillance.
Collaborated with Luis Elizondo to disclose the Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program (AATIP) to the public.
Worked for the Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program (AATIP).
Influential in leading congressional committees to seek information regarding UAP investigations and supported the UAP Disclosure Act.
Supported Senator Chuck Schumer's efforts regarding UAP disclosure legislation.
Served as a Senior Advisor, playing a leading role in helping UAP witnesses come forward.
Founded the Lucis Trust (originally Lucifer Publishing Company).
Her writings on Theosophy shared much in common with those of Helena Blavatsky.
Developed a close relationship and strategic alliance with the government of Iran.
Served as the principal investigator of the Stratospheric Controlled Perturbation Experiment (SCoPEx).
Served as fellow astronauts on the Apollo 11 mission, with both walking on the Moon.
Sean Parker brought Peter Thiel on as Facebook's first investor.
Sean Parker became a managing partner at Founders Fund, a venture-capital fund founded by Peter Thiel.
Served as Director of Central Intelligence (DCI).
Testified before the Senate Church Committee regarding U.S. intelligence activities.
Succeeded as Director of Central Intelligence by George H.W. Bush.
Served as Director of the Central Intelligence Agency.
Succeeded Leon Panetta as Director of the CIA.
Succeeded as Director of the CIA by John Brennan.
Volunteered to take part in a CIA-financed MKULTRA drug-testing program at the Menlo Park Veterans' Hospital.
Participated in the MKULTRA project directed by Sidney Gottlieb.
Worked as a special agent for the Air Force Office of Special Investigations (AFOSI).
Directed disinformation campaigns against Paul Bennewitz, feeding him false information.
Served as chairman of the board of directors for Bayer AG.
Convicted at the Nuremberg Trials for 'mass murder and enslavement' and 'plunder and spoliation'.
Led the NATO intervention in Libya.
Climate scientist at the Carnegie Institution for Science.
Climate scientist at Breakthrough Energy.
Began advising Bill Gates on climate change and energy issues.
Selected as an astronaut by NASA.
Served as a jet fighter pilot during the Korean War and retired from the Air Force.
Served as lunar module pilot for Apollo 11, the first manned lunar landing mission.
The Flexner Report, funded by the Carnegie Foundation, was supported by the AMA.
Served as Director of Central Intelligence.
Appointed Director of Central Intelligence by President Bill Clinton.
The ACLU filed a lawsuit against James Clapper challenging the NSA's bulk phone metadata collection program.
Edward Snowden's leaks detailed NSA activities, leading to the controversy James Clapper was involved in.
The ruling in ACLU v. Clapper, in which James Clapper was the defendant, became moot when Congress clarified NSA surveillance procedures in the USA Freedom Act of 2015.
Served on President Eisenhower's National Security Council.
Authored 'The Day After Roswell', a memoir claiming the U.S. government made use of extraterrestrial technology recovered from the Roswell incident.
Served as president of the Institute of Noetic Sciences.
Held joint appointments as a senior social scientist at SRI International and director of SRI's Educational Policy Research Center.
Became a target of an AFOSI disinformation campaign.
Served as a CIA officer, recruited to the Office of Policy Coordination (OPC).
Led the on-the-ground execution of Operation Ajax.
Orchestrated the overthrow of Iranian Prime Minister Mohammad Mossadegh during Operation Ajax.
Held the key patent (US4686605A) underlying HAARP technology.
Founder and CEO of Make Sunsets.
Expressed admiration for Donald Trump and his ministry.
Bill Clinton attended an early morning service at Lakewood Church.
